entry.title: UBCO NGFW Security Update, August 12, 2026. 20:00-21:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 12, 20:00 - 21:00 PDT

Jun 16, 14:55 PDT
Scheduled - The UBCO campus border firewall will be under maintenance for security upgrades.

This maintenance will not impact UBCO network traffic and services.

entry.title: Turnitin and Gradescope Scheduled Maintenance — July 18, 2026, 8:00 a.m. – 2:00 p.m. Pacific
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 18, 08:00 - 14:00 PDT

Jun 23, 14:39 PDT
Scheduled - There will be a scheduled Turnitin and Gradescope maintenance outage on Saturday, July 18, 2026, from 8:00 a.m. to 2:00 p.m. Pacific. During this period, the https://turnitin.com/ standalone Turnitin tool, the Turnitin integration on Canvas, and Gradescope may have intermittent availability.

Please email LT.Hub@ubc.ca if you have any questions or concerns.

entry.title: TouchNet PROD site - Scheduled Maintenance July 17, 2026 - 12:00 a.m. to July 17, 2026 - 04:00 a.m.
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 17, 00:00 - 04:00 PDT

Jun 26, 15:11 PDT
Scheduled - The TouchNet PROD site will be undergoing scheduled maintenance. During the update window the TouchNet PROD site will be offline for logging in by staff as a TouchNet user and for customers making new payments. During this time when the payor clicks "pay now" TouchNet will display a screen informing the payor that the system is off line for maintenance and to try again after the system is back online.

For any questions please contact dpp.support@ubc.ca

entry.title: TouchNet TEST site - Scheduled Maintenance July 10, 2026 - 05:00 a.m. to July 10, 2026 - 05:00 p.m.
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 10, 05:00 - 17:00 PDT

Jun 26, 15:10 PDT
Scheduled - The TouchNet TEST site will be undergoing scheduled maintenance. During the update window the TouchNet TEST site will be offline for logging in by staff as a TouchNet user and for making TEST payments.

For any questions please contact dpp.support@ubc.ca

entry.title: Emergency Power System Load-Shedding Verification Test – Pharmacy Building and University Data Center
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 8, 06:30 - 08:30 PDT

Jun 17, 14:46 PDT
Scheduled - On Wednesday, July 8, 2026, between 6:30 a.m. and 8:30 a.m., a scheduled test of the Pharmacy Building's emergency power system will be conducted. The purpose of this test is to verify the automatic load-shedding functionality of the standby electrical systems when one of the building's two emergency generators is taken out of service.

During the test, brief interruptions may occur to systems served by the Standby power distribution. Emergency and Data Center power systems are expected to remain operational throughout the test, with the Data Center UPS maintaining uninterrupted service. Qualified Operations, Electrical, Controls, BMS, and IT Facilities personnel will be on-site to monitor system performance and respond to any issues.

entry.title: Workday Scheduled Weekly Maintenance July 03, 2026, 21:00 PT to July 04, 2026, 00:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 3, 21:00 PDT  -  Jul 4, 00:00 PDT

Jun 29, 15:10 PDT
Scheduled - Please be advised that on July 03, 2026, 21:00 PT to July 04, 2026, 00:00 PT, Workday will be undergoing scheduled maintenance as part of its weekly service update. The system will remain accessible during the scheduled maintenance period but it is advised not to run critical processes and tasks.

Learn about Workday Support at UBC and other available resources on isc.ubc.ca.

THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 2, 07:00 - 08:00 PDT

Jun 23, 14:21 PDT
Scheduled - Jupyter Open will be unavailable due to scheduled maintenance on July 2, 2026 07:00 - 08:00 PT

entry.title: Enterprise Automation & Solution Delivery service maintenance for Graduation Management Application 29 Jun 2026 10:00 PT - 29 Jun 2026 16:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 29, 16:01 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 29, 10:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 25, 08:51 PDT
Scheduled - The Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery (EASD) Graduation Management Application will undergo maintenance from 29 Jun 2026 from 10:00 and validation until 29 Jun 2026 16:00

Apps/Services:
Bug fixes for Graduation Management Application (CNVM-Appian)
To fix a bug that prevent student creating second graduation application when having an existing application
To fix a bug that confirmation emails are missing

Impacts:
During this maintenance there may be a brief interruption (from 29 Jun 2026 from 12:00 - 12:30) to the apps and services listed above.

Impacted Services:
ubc-iec--appian-web-graduation-management-application--1

entry.title: Scheduled Maintenance for Graduation Management Application (CNVM- Appian) from 29 Jun 2026 10:00 PT - 29 Jun 2026 16:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 29, 16:01 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 29, 10:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 18, 15:05 PDT
Scheduled - The Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery (EASD) Graduation Management Application will undergo maintenance from 29 Jun 2026 from 10:00 to 29 Jun 2026 16:00. During this period, there may be a brief service interruption between 12:00 PM and 12:30 PM PT. Staff and students using the application are advised to plan accordingly.

entry.title: Enterprise Automation & Solution Delivery service maintenance for SEI Review 29 Jun 2026 10:00 - 29 Jun 2026 16:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 29, 16:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 29, 10:01 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 25, 08:50 PDT
Scheduled - The Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery (EASD) SEI Review will undergo maintenance from 29 Jun 2026 from 10:00 - 29 Jun 2026 16:00

Apps/Services:

Bug fixes for SEI Review (TeachEval Appian)
Added Notification when a Approved Declared Section is deleted and when an Approved Declared Section's enrollment drops less than 5
Added automatic discrepancy check between AARS and TeachEval records and notify staff.
Impacts :

During this maintenance there may be a brief interruption (from 29 Jun 2026 from 10:00 - 10:30) to the apps and services listed above.

entry.title: Okanagan campus voicemail issue - Friday June 26, 2026
entry.content:
Jun 29, 10:58 PDT
Resolved - This incident has been resolved.

Jun 26, 11:42 PDT
Identified - We have received reports of issues leaving and retrieving voicemail messages at the Okanagan campus. Technicians have investigated and found the cause of the issue. To minimize disruption to phone services during the business day, emergency maintenance will be performed this evening to correct the issue.

entry.title: Okanagan campus contact centre issue, June 29, 2026 09:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 29, 16:03 PDT
Update - Technicians continue to work with our vendor to resolve the issue.

Jun 29, 14:03 PDT
Update - Technicians continue to work with our vendor to resolve the issue.

Jun 29, 11:04 PDT
Identified - We have also received reports of contact centre agents not being able to login. Currently logged in agents appear to be unaffected. Technicians have identified the potential cause and have engaged our vendor to assist with remediation. No resolution ETA available at this time. Next update at 12:00 PT.

Jun 29, 10:44 PDT
Investigating - We have received reports of contact centres at the Okanagan campus not presenting the interactive voice menu prompts to inbound callers. Calls are being delivered to agents. Technicians are investigating the cause. No ETA for resolution available at this time. Next update at 11:00 PT.

entry.title: UBC Wireless Network Maintenance on June, 28, 2026 18:00 to 19:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 28, 19:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 28, 18:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 23, 14:37 PDT
Scheduled - We will be performing wireless network maintenance on June, 28, 2026 18:00 PT to 19:00 PT. During this time, there will be a brief outage to the wireless network at the UBC Okanagan campus.

Jun 28, 17:00 PDT

Jun 26, 17:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 23, 14:25 PDT

During a longer period within this time, the SITS/e:Vision (including the Graduate Studies Admission System and Sauder Executive Education Registration
System) will not be available.

Scheduled - UBC IT will be performing DNS/DHCP server maintenance on June 27, 2026, 07:30-15:30 PT. For properly configured DNS, there should be no interruptions.

Scheduled - UBC IT will be performing network firewall upgrade for HABC network at the UBC Vancouver Campus, June 27, 2026, 08:30-14:00 PT. During this maintenance window, you may experience a brief network interruption (<1 min) during the system failover.

During this time Apple devices will not be able to contact the server for updates, however no disruption to the use of Apple devices is expected.

entry.title: UBC Hospital Switchboard Delay
entry.content:
Jun 26, 15:39 PDT
Investigating - Users calling in to the UBC Hospital switchboard at 604-822-7121 or Emergency Line 7111 are experiencing a 14 second delay with silence before they will be successfully connected to the switchboard operator.

entry.title: WeBWorK Infrastructure Migration Jun 26, 2026 14:00-14:59 PT
entry.content:
Jun 26, 14:59 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 26, 14:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 16, 14:58 PDT
Scheduled - WeBWorK (webwork.elearning.ubc.ca) will be unavailable on Jun 26, 2026 between 14:00 and 14:59 PT while the service is migrated to new infrastructure. Users with an active session may need to log in again. We apologize for any inconvenience; questions can be directed to the LT Hub (lt.hub@ubc.ca).

entry.title: Web/ASDM Firewall Login Issue via Cisco ISE
entry.content:
Jun 26, 13:53 PDT
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an issue affecting ASDM authentication via Cisco ISE in order to manage some departmental ASA firewall contexts.
We are working closely with the vendor to resolve this. Currently a fix or workaround has not been identified. We will provide an update as soon as one is available.
Thank you for your patience and cooperation.

entry.title: Network Database Upgrade June 26, 2026 07:00 - 09:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 26, 09:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 26, 07:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 23, 14:29 PDT
Scheduled - The following Network tools will be unavailable during the database upgrade:

- Transmogrifier
- IP Manager
- IP Search
- FileMaker Pro

entry.title: EASD Planned Maintenance for Minor EASD RDS Upgrade on June 25th, 2026, 17:00 - 20:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 25, 20:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 25, 17:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 16, 14:50 PDT
Scheduled - Multiple enterprise services will undergo maintenance on June 25th, 2026, from 17:00 to 20:00 PT.

Maintenance will be performed after hours to minimize potential impacts.

Release Notes

The following maintenance activities will be completed:

Upgrade EASD AWS Aurora PostgreSQL Database iecrds-prd-11 from v15.10 to v15.17
Apply AWS OS patches
Release Impact

There may be interruptions to the applications below for up to 5 minutes while the database patches are performed.

Services may be impacted during the upgrade.

EASD RDS may experience an interruption of up to 5 minutes during the upgrade. The read-only instance will remain available, so the impact should be limited to applications or integrations connecting to the read-write instance.
DAF data is expected to remain online throughout the maintenance window.
Mule APIs, including services available through api.ubc.ca, may experience intermittent outages if they connect to the read-write instance or if their connection strings have not been updated to use the standby configuration.
Scheduled Rundeck jobs may be delayed during the maintenance window and will be re-run after the outage, where applicable.
All services are expected to recover automatically after the maintenance is completed.
